Model ID   : MODEL-LNGC-241K-001
Title      : LNGC 241K Hull Model
Discipline : 선체/기관/화물 통합

1. Model Overview
This model summary defines the reusable engineering basis and EBOM scope for the 241K LNG carrier.

2. EBOM Items
- HULL-BLOCK-B01 / Hull block assembly / Qty 14
- ENG-MEGI-01 / Main engine package ME-GI / Qty 1
- CARGO-TANK-MK3 / Cargo tank system Mark III Flex / Qty 4
- CARGO-PUMP-02 / Cargo pump set / Qty 2

3. Design Notes
- Existing 241K hull model reused for edit design baseline.
- Main engine arrangement based on ME-GI package.
- Cargo handling and tank system aligned with 241K capacity.
